issue.title: @gitclaw /migrate plan hermes e2e 20260531T172434Z
issue.body:
Live migration-plan E2E.

Hidden migration plan token: GITCLAW_MIGRATION_PLAN_E2E_20260531T172434Z
This should produce a deterministic dry-run migration plan for Hermes without scanning source homes, importing secrets, mutating the repository, or dumping issue bodies.
Any migration behavior change must also run a live GitHub Models conversation E2E.
issue.author: AnandChowdhary

Live migration-plan E2E.

Hidden migration plan token: GITCLAW_MIGRATION_PLAN_E2E_20260531T172434Z
This should produce a deterministic dry-run migration plan for Hermes without scanning source homes, importing secrets, mutating the repository, or dumping issue bodies.
Any migration behavior change must also run a live GitHub Models conversation E2E.

## GitClaw Migration Plan Report

Generated without a model call.

This is a migration planner only. It maps known agent-state surfaces into GitClaw's repo-reviewed layout without scanning source homes, importing secrets, executing installers, mutating files, or calling a model.

### Source Import Map
- source_kind=`config.yaml providers` target=`.gitclaw/config.yml` action=`reviewed-merge` review=`model/provider config only`
- source_kind=`SOUL.md` target=`.gitclaw/SOUL.md` action=`manual-copy` review=`identity/persona`
- source_kind=`AGENTS.md` target=`AGENTS.md` action=`manual-copy` review=`workspace instructions`
- source_kind=`memories/MEMORY.md` target=`.gitclaw/MEMORY.md` action=`reviewed-append` review=`long-term memory`
- source_kind=`memories/USER.md` target=`.gitclaw/USER.md` action=`reviewed-append` review=`user profile`
- source_kind=`skills/<name>/SKILL.md` target=`.gitclaw/SKILLS/<name>/SKILL.md` action=`manual-copy` review=`repo-local skills`
- source_kind=`mcp_servers` target=`.gitclaw/TOOLS.md` action=`manual-review` review=`MCP server definitions require explicit tool review`
- source_kind=`cron jobs` target=`.gitclaw/proactive/*.md` action=`manual-rewrite` review=`scheduled prompts only`
- source_kind=`sessions/state.db` target=`gitclaw-backups archive` action=`archive-only` review=`raw sessions stay out of prompt context`
- source_kind=`auth.json/.env` target=`manual secret setup` action=`skip` review=`credential import disabled`

### Current GitClaw Target Inventory
- kind=`context` path=`.gitclaw/SOUL.md` bytes=`576` lines=`14` sha256_12=`0460b93e1a5c`
- kind=`context` path=`.gitclaw/IDENTITY.md` bytes=`179` lines=`6` sha256_12=`8ba22d9e5696`
- kind=`context` path=`.gitclaw/USER.md` bytes=`158` lines=`4` sha256_12=`29b734b95c5b`
- kind=`context` path=`.gitclaw/TOOLS.md` bytes=`1689` lines=`35` sha256_12=`ebac96242a29`
- kind=`context` path=`.gitclaw/MEMORY.md` bytes=`9079` lines=`133` sha256_12=`53a77ed8e4f8`
- kind=`context` path=`.gitclaw/HEARTBEAT.md` bytes=`594` lines=`14` sha256_12=`8cf6f2724640`
- kind=`context` path=`.gitclaw/STANDING_ORDERS.md` bytes=`1234` lines=`30` sha256_12=`d669e2c1597c`
- kind=`context` path=`.gitclaw/HOOKS.md` bytes=`881` lines=`23` sha256_12=`c15fe8387340`
- kind=`context` path=`.gitclaw/PLUGINS.md` bytes=`1360` lines=`28` sha256_12=`3621d1173dfe`
- kind=`context` path=`.gitclaw/TASKS.md` bytes=`1102` lines=`27` sha256_12=`398acad742c2`
- kind=`context` path=`.gitclaw/AGENTS.md` bytes=`1051` lines=`25` sha256_12=`31ee237e518a`
- kind=`context` path=`.gitclaw/NODES.md` bytes=`1119` lines=`24` sha256_12=`1203b8329178`
- kind=`context` path=`.gitclaw/ARTIFACTS.md` bytes=`1399` lines=`31` sha256_12=`03256eacb58d`
- kind=`context` path=`.gitclaw/DIFFS.md` bytes=`1231` lines=`27` sha256_12=`db119119b799`
- kind=`context` path=`.gitclaw/WORKSPACE.md` bytes=`1148` lines=`22` sha256_12=`94691b4c908b`
- kind=`context` path=`.gitclaw/memory/2026-05-29.md` bytes=`5920` lines=`100` sha256_12=`b373343cb4be`
- kind=`skill` name=`repo-reader` path=`.gitclaw/SKILLS/repo-reader/SKILL.md` enabled=`true` sha256_12=`2f9e68a57bd6`
- kind=`skill-bundle` name=`repo-context` path=`.gitclaw/skill-bundles/repo-context.yaml` resolved_skills=`repo-reader` sha256_12=`4a6baa73f30e`

### Review Steps
1. Run the source system's own dry-run or export command and keep its report out of issue comments if it contains bodies or secrets.
2. Verify the current GitClaw backup branch before applying any imported state.
3. Copy only reviewed declarative files into `.gitclaw/`, `AGENTS.md`, or `.gitclaw/SKILLS/`; quarantine credentials, hooks, plugins, MCP definitions, caches, logs, sessions, and generated state for manual review.
4. Re-run `/soul verify`, `/skills verify`, `/tools verify`, and a live GitHub Models conversation E2E that performs an actual model call after any migration change.

### Findings
- severity=`info` code=`preview_first` detail=`migration planning is dry-run metadata only`
- severity=`info` code=`backup_first` detail=`verify gitclaw-backups before applying any imported state`
- severity=`info` code=`credentials_manual` detail=`credentials, tokens, auth profiles, cookies, and API keys are not imported by...`
- severity=`info` code=`executable_state_quarantined` detail=`hooks, plugins, installers, MCP servers, caches, logs, raw sessions, and gate...`
- severity=`warning` code=`manual_review_required` detail=`hermes migration requires human review before files are copied`

@gitclaw Continue with the repo-reader skill and search the repository for `gclaw-migration-plan-followup-needle`.

Search for that exact phrase, not shorter words from it.
The matching repository search result line has the form `gclaw-migration-plan-followup-needle => <token>`.
Reply with only the uppercase fixture token after the arrow from the matching gitclaw.search_files tool output line.
Do not answer with the migration report token, issue title, issue number, migration source, or any token from this issue/comments.
Do not include this hidden follow-up token: NOECHO_MIGRATION_PLAN_FOLLOWUP_20260531T172434Z
Keep the answer under 30 words.
